data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and the Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Hundreds of Hezbollah terrorists killed in 24 hours prior to ceasefire • IRGC claims capture of two ships • Trump extends US-Iran ceasefire
